title: Release quality gate
description: Strict profile validation and aggregate gates. No false-green: only envelope status ok counts as pass.
requiredEvidence: verify-deprecations -Strict ok (no forbidden deprecated scripts on orchestrator or gate surfaces)
verify-upgrade-notes -Strict ok (contract schemaVersion bumps documented in upgrade-manifest.json)
os-validate strict aggregate JSON status ok (includes os-validate-all -Strict at end of strict profile)
Release checklist or decision-log entry for residual risk when applicable
strictModeBehavior: Evaluator always applies strict semantics for this gate: reject skip, warn, fail, unknown, degraded, blocked, and human-readable aliases skipped/not_run as equivalent to non-pass (aligned with runtime-budget.neverTreatAsPassed).
